name: @akaoio/zen
description: A realtime, decentralized, offline-first, graph data synchronization engine.

scripts.debug: node --prof-process --preprocess -j isolate*.log > v8data.json && rm isolate*.log && echo 'drag & drop ./v8data.json into https://mapbox.github.io/flamebearer/'
scripts.test: npm run buildZEN && npm run test:all
scripts.test:core: npm run clean && cross-env GUN_TEST_TMP=1 ZEN_SILENCE_TEST_WARNINGS=1 node --import ./test/loaders/register-zen-minified.mjs ./node_modules/mocha/bin/_mocha --exit test/abc.js test/rad/rad.js test/radix.js test/zen.js
scripts.testZEN:unit: npm run clean && cross-env GUN_TEST_TMP=1 ZEN_TEST=1 node --import ./test/loaders/register-zen-minified.mjs ./node_modules/mocha/bin/_mocha --exit test/zen/instance.js test/zen/secp256k1.js test/zen/crypto.js test/zen/multicurve.js test/zen/certify.js test/zen/recover.js
scripts.testZEN: npm run buildZEN && npm run testZEN:unit
scripts.buildZEN: npm run buildPEN && npm run buildCrypto && node lib/builder/zen.js && npm run minifyZEN
scripts.buildRelease: npm run buildZEN && npm run minify
scripts.testPEN:unit: npm run clean && cross-env GUN_TEST_TMP=1 mocha test/pen.js --timeout 10000
scripts.testPEN: npm run buildZEN && npm run testPEN:unit
scripts.verifyRelease: npm run buildRelease && npm run test:all

author: Mark Nadal
